Driver Profile

More than
a job title.

Six years of real commercial experience before the MSc was finished.

The Story

That's where the commercial instinct comes from. The formal education came alongside it — a BBA in E-Commerce and Digital Marketing from Woxsen University, then an MSc in Business with International Management at Northumbria University, graduating March 2026. During that time, 32 certifications from Google, Bloomberg, Anthropic, AWS, IBM, IE Business School, Erasmus University and others.

Phani doesn't fit one job title. Never tried to.

Six years managing supplier relationships, overseeing production pipelines, coordinating distribution across multiple product lines, and leading brand development and marketing strategy for own clothing labels. He knows what it means to make decisions that affect margins, not just campaigns.

Now based in the UK. MSc completed. Looking for a role in digital marketing, ecommerce, business development, CRM or commercial strategy — somewhere that values both the experience and the thinking behind it.

Race Results

Podium finishes.
Real impact.

Built from scratch. Decisions that affect margins, not just metrics.

Sector 01 · Clothing Wholesale & Manufacturing

Family Business

Six years running the commercial side of a clothing wholesale, manufacturing and distribution business in Hyderabad. Managed sourcing and procurement across mens, womens and kids clothing ranges. Oversaw production from raw material to finished garment under own brand labels. Set pricing strategy, managed margins, built wholesale buyer relationships, and led brand development and marketing strategy for multiple clothing labels.

Brand ManagementSupplier NegotiationPricing StrategyDistributionMarketing StrategyStock Management

Sector 02 · Academic Research

Dissertation

Primary research examining how fast fashion brands use pricing, trend cycles, and sustainability messaging to influence consumer behaviour. Analysed the commercial, environmental, and reputational impact of fast fashion strategies on the clothing industry.

Fast FashionConsumer BehaviourSustainabilityMarket Analysis

Sector 03 · E-Commerce & Digital

Stylistique

Built two live websites for Stylistique — a clothing brand built from scratch. A fully functional e-commerce store and a fashion blog covering trends, brand analysis, and consumer insights with SEO content strategy.

WixE-CommerceNo-CodeFashion BrandSEO
